response.justification: While Bogdan possesses exceptional technical skills that perfectly align with both the required and nice-to-have qualifications (TypeScript, React, AWS, LLMs), he is vastly overqualified for this Junior/Mid-level role. With over 15 years of experience and current titles like Staff Software Engineer and Founder, it is highly unlikely that the scope, responsibilities, and compensation of an entry-level individual contributor position will meet his expectations.
strengths: Deep expertise in the core stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and REST API architecture.
Possesses highly desired nice-to-have skills such as LLM integration, AWS, and Kubernetes.
Strong advocate for clean code, TDD, and modern software craftsmanship methodologies.
concerns: Extreme overqualification for an entry-level or junior position.
High likelihood of compensation and role scope misalignment.
Potential flight risk if hired into a junior role with limited architectural authority.
